Starting in January 2026, the renowned machine vision brands Allied Vision, Chromasens, Mikrotron, NET, and SVS-Vistek will be consolidated under the Allied Vision brand. The companies, which are all part of the TKH Group NV, will combine their extensive technological expertise, individual strengths, and diverse industry knowledge, becoming a top-tier provider of seamlessly integrated hardware and software solutions - delivered with a customer-centric focus and the convenience of a single, unified source.

Axon Machine Vision GmbH & Co. KG. # Axon Machine Vision GmbH & Co. KG

Axon Machine Vision GmbH & Co. KG is a Industrial Automation company. AXON Machine Vision is a system for automatic object recognition for large product assortments in logistics, production, and trade. It provides flexible visual object identification for various applications in the logistics, production, and trade industries. Founded in 2006. Headquartered in Bergisch Gladbach, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.
